greeting: 👋🏻 Hi This is a bot for connecting to Vexel VPN🛡️ Available servers: ├ 🇳🇱Netherlands ├ 🇱🇻Latvia ├ 🇫🇮Finland ├ 🇹🇷Turkey ├ 🇷🇺Russia | YouTube without ads └ 🔓Whitelist bypass | LTE-only networks Benefits: • High speed • Unlimited traffic on main servers • 50 GB/mo for whitelist bypass • Up to 5 devices per subscription
payment_summary: 💳 Subscription for %s — %d ₽ Tap "Pay" to proceed to payment.
payment_summary_device_addon_note: 📱 Of that, %d ₽ is the subscription and %d ₽ is the device-slot renewal.
payment_unavailable: ⚠️ Payments are temporarily unavailable. Try again later or contact support.
no_subscription: You don't have an active subscription
subscription_expiring: ⚠️ Subscription expires %s Renew ahead of time to avoid losing access.
trial_activation_error: ❌ Couldn't activate the trial. Try again in a minute, or contact support.
trial_text: Trial period: 3 days • Unlimited on main servers • 5 GB for bypass mode
trial_already_active: You already have an active subscription
referral_text: Invited: %d +7 days of access for every friend who pays for a subscription
referral_link_unavailable: ❌ The referral link is temporarily unavailable.
referral_error: ❌ Couldn't load your referral data. Please try again shortly.
tribute_cancelled:
❌ Your Tribute subscription was cancelled.

Purchase a new subscription to keep using the VPN.
topup_disclaimer: 📦 +%[1]d GB of traffic — %[2]d ₽ Your base plan is %[3]d GB/month, refreshed automatically. This adds +%[1]d GB on top for the rest of your current subscription term. Unused GB carries over if you renew before using it all — but if you spend it all, your next renewal resets you back to just the base %[3]d GB, and you'd need to buy the top-up again.
topup_custom_prompt: ✏️ Enter the amount of GB (from %d to %d):
topup_custom_out_of_range: ❌ Amount must be between %d and %d GB.
topup_pending_warning: ⏳ Payment not finished Wait for it to complete or cancel it.
topup_no_subscription:
❌ Buying extra traffic requires an active subscription.

Get a subscription — the "Buy" button.
devices_panel_error: ❌ Failed to load data from the panel. Please try again later.
devices_reset_confirm: ⚠️ Confirm reset After reset: • All devices will be disconnected • You'll get a new link • Devices need to be reconnected Continue?
devices_reset_success_webapp: ✅ Devices reset! Old connections disconnected. Tap "Connect" to reconnect your devices.
devices_reset_error: ❌ Failed to reset devices. Please contact support.
trial_expiring: ⏰ Trial period ends %s Get a subscription to continue without interruption.
traffic_warning: ⚠️ Traffic almost used up %.1f GB of %.1f GB Buy more traffic to keep your access.
devices_list_footer: Tap a device button below to remove it:
devices_empty: 📱 My devices No connected devices. Connect a device using the "Connect" button.
topup_trial_only: ⚠️ Extra traffic is only available on a paid subscription.
topup_error: ❌ Failed to create request. Please try again later.
admin_status_active:
✅ Access restored!

Your VPN is active again.
admin_status_disabled:
⛔ Access suspended.

If this is a mistake, please contact support.
admin_traffic_reset: 🔄 Traffic reset by an administrator. Full volume available again.
admin_subscription_extended:
🎉 Subscription extended by %d days.

Active until: %s
admin_devices_reset: 🔄 Devices reset by an administrator. Reconnect them again.
admin_topup_increase:
📦 +%d GB of traffic credited.

New limit: %d GB.
admin_topup_decrease:
📦 %d GB of traffic deducted.

New limit: %d GB.

admin_trial_disabled: 📴 Account switched to a regular plan by an administrator.

admin_tribute_autorenew_resumed: ▶️ Subscription auto-renewal has been resumed by an administrator.
device_topup_success:
✅ +1 device slot added.
Current device limit: %d.
device_disclaimer_bundled: ➕ +%[1]d device slot(s) — %[2]d ₽ (prorated for the days left in this cycle) From now on it's included in your subscription renewal price.
device_disclaimer_standalone: ➕ +%[1]d device slot(s) — %[2]d ₽ (prorated for the days left in this cycle) From now on it renews separately, every ~30 days.
device_addon_renewal_reminder: 🔁 Device slot renewal You have %d extra device slot(s). Renewal cost — %d ₽. Pay to keep your current device limit.
device_addon_renewed: ✅ Device slots (%d) renewed for another cycle.
device_addon_grace_started: ⚠️ Device slot payment not received You have %d extra device slot(s). Pay %d ₽ within 24 hours, or your device limit will be reduced.
device_addon_expired: ❌ Device slots (%d) removed due to non-payment. Your device limit has been reduced.
device_no_subscription:
❌ Buying extra device slots requires an active subscription.

Get a subscription — the "Buy" button.
device_trial_only: ⚠️ Buying extra device slots is only available on a paid subscription.
device_manage_prompt: ⚙️ Manage device slots Base slots: %[1]d (included in your plan, always available) Extra slots purchased: %[2]d Total slots: %[3]d Currently connected: %[4]d of %[3]d Type the number of extra slots you want to have (0 to %[5]d). More than now — you pay for the remaining days of the cycle. Less than now — no refund, takes effect at your next renewal. The base %[1]d always stay — they can't be reduced.
device_manage_invalid: ⚠️ Enter a whole number from 0 to %d.
device_decrease_pending_note: ⏳ From your next renewal, device slots will become: %d (no refund for the period you already paid for).
